review.citation: Ferreira MKM, et al. Is there any association between fluoride exposure and thyroid function modulation? A systematic review. PLOS ONE. 2024.

identity.title: Is there any association between fluoride exposure and thyroid function modulation? A systematic review

question.naturalLanguageInput: Is fluoride exposure associated with changes in thyroid function in humans?
question.structuredInput: In human populations exposed to fluoride, particularly through drinking water, assess the association between higher fluoride exposure and thyroid hormone concentrations, thyroid-stimulating hormone, thyroid volume, or thyroid dysfunction compared with lower exposure; prioritize observational exposure studies.
eligibilityCriteria: Human participants with measured or defined fluoride exposure
Compares higher and lower fluoride exposure or reports an exposure-response analysis
Measures thyroid hormones, TSH, thyroid volume, or thyroid dysfunction

population: children or adults exposed to fluoride
